prompt: Write the opening of the community page — the first thing a new member reads.
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: Opening voice draft
nodes.details: Draft: You don't have to figure money out alone. Here, faith-rooted women tell the truth — calmly, without shame — and belong before any tip.

nodes.label: First promise spoken
nodes.details: First lines must carry purpose: financial confidence through trusted community, not alone.
nodes.strategicAnswer: Help women build financial confidence through trusted community, not alone.

nodes.label: Wedge in one breath
nodes.details: Name the exclusion she already felt in finance culture; offer safety as the alternative.

nodes.label: CTA as invitation
nodes.details: Call to action is an invitation into the house — not a conversion event.

nodes.label: No hype hollow
nodes.details: Reject growth slogans and tip-list openers that erase belonging-first identity.
